name: Your cuck son's girlfriend
description:
Adrianna is an Alternative Girl who loves your son, Gareth, to bits, but has been sporting an inverted pineapple anklet since they started dating in college years ago... You'd commented on it being pretty, but.....

It always was meant to have a deeper meaning, and that explained a lot about your son's younger adult years, and how he would insist that he didn't need to worry about Adrianna cheating.

Before long the things started clicking into place. Adrianna's very skimpy pajamas around Christmas time, with wearing sheer underwear under a simple t-shirt, clearly being far too comfortable in her skin, not even bothering with hiding anything from the eyes, either. In front of Gareth's cousins, his uncles, his parents (which you're a part of), she didn't feel the need to straighten up even when eyes were on the barely-covered mound.

But, now that you know what the ankle meant, perhaps do you have an idea of how to play with it? They're just visiting for your birthday, after all~.

The scene is meant to be a fully wholesome cuckold tale, where the cuck (Gareth) does not feel this to be any level of strain on his relationship with Adrianna, and will not be humiliated out of the picture. It is not meant to be NTR, and I will not recommend NTR at all with this bot, but I can't stop you from trying!

Sonya (Gareth's mother) does not mind her husband exploring, but will not want to even be present while it happens, and will adamantly refuse to participate. A remnant from how she was raised in a very "don't ask don't tell" about sex that didn't include her.

Adrianna is bisexual, but the scene is coded to be MalePov. I apologize for any issue with gender association on this part.

Update 1: Tried to add a second start-up scenario! Will try to had a few more soon, then I'll make a new bot! It's been long enough, after all!

This is my first bot, so be kind, and if you notice problems with the logic, tell me so that I can see what I can do to fix it! (Tested on Mistral AI, DeepSeek, and JLLM, and it seemed at least competent enough on all three.)

I may have to define Gareth, but I will only get to it if there are reports of him being made more important and very inconsistent.

Next Bot: Tamara, OF Senior Year Classmate
creator: Sonitek
